{
  "claims": [
    "Expanding data center infrastructure is essential for the continued growth and competitiveness of the tech industry in California.",
    "SB 1298 aims to meet the increasing demand for data centers while maintaining environmental standards.",
    "The bill would increase the threshold for data center eligibility under the Small Power Plant Exemption from 100 MW to 150 MW.",
    "SB 1298 is designed to support critical services such as hospitals, transportation, banking, and public safety.",

    "Passing SB 1298 could generate thousands of jobs for communities across California."
